meta.title: A Tour of the Air Force's Super Sonic Jet Trainer
meta.description:
Plus a special mission at the end that few people, even in the Air Force, know about............................

HASARD Bio:
Fighter pilot in the U.S. Air Force Reserve. Previously flew the F-16, including 82 combat missions. 

Free Newsletter with occasional patch giveaways: https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/newsletter
